caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white collared shirt and a grey blazer, stands beside a large presentation screen during a talk at EuroPython. The screen displays a dark blue background with a geometric white line pattern and the heading "TODAY: INDUSTRY-READY ML". Below this, the screen lists several bullet points: "Overview & caveats in scaling data pipelines", "Airflow components (Celery, ML models, etc)", "Introducing difference between ML & Data Pipelines", and "Overview of Airflow + Usecase", concluding with the phrase "THE BIG PICTURE". The bottom of the slide includes the "europython" logo with a green snake and the text "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his posture, moving from a still position with his arms at his side to gesturing with his left hand while speaking, while the slide content remains static throughout.
